MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JULIA PREDMORE's Motion To Dismiss Claims Of Plaintiff Julia Predmore.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss claims" is granted.

Order signed.
